title: Selenicereus urbanianus

intro: Selenicereus urbanianus, also known as the Puerto Rican night-blooming cereus, is a species of cactus native to Puerto Rico and the surrounding islands. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities that can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Selenicereus urbanianus include flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
